content_body:
Dear Gary, Lissa, Taylor and Travis: We are having the most fabulous time ever! Spencer (14) and Mallory (10) love the pool table. Even Rick has played multiple games! We were even able to "guilt" Rick into getting in the hot tub for our pleasure! He loved it once he was in. Thank you for recommending Toccoa Riverside Restaurant (706-632-7891). The trout was excellent! We feel so at home here and love all the conveniences you have provided. What a blessing Crooked Creek Cabin was to all of us! Thank you for everything. We will be back!
GA
title: Awesome Vacation with Cabin Rentals of Georgia
